results.rendered_html:
ava-√sañj (ind.p. -sajya, Imper. 3. pl. Pass. -sajyantām) to suspend, attach to, append,  MBh. xv, 436 ;  Hariv. ;  R. , (cf. ava-√sṛj at end);
to charge with (a business; acc.),  R. iv, 42, 7  :
Ā. -sajjate, to adhere or cleave to, not leave undisturbed,  MBh. xiii, 2198.
